name: Potatoes Perfect
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a crockpot with aluminum foil, leaving enough to overlap the potatoes when finished.
2. Layer half of the bacon, onions, potatoes, and cheese in the crockpot.
3. Season to taste and dot with butter.
4. Repeat layers of bacon, onions, potatoes, and cheese.
5. Dot with butter again.
6. Overlap the remaining foil and cover the crockpot.
7. Cook on low setting for 10 to 12 hours.
